figures.caption: Table 1. Comparison results on two different datasets (HCP, ZDXX). We run 10 times and record average acc ± std (%).

Figure 2. The overall framework of our proposed M3D-BFS. It consists of 3 stages: (1) stage 1: training for uni-modal encoders. (2) stage 2: pretraining of M3D-BFS by using single expert. (3) stage 3: Finetuning M3D-BFS via finetuing MoE blocks. Ldisen is designed to enhance final embeddings. Structures of MoEs (uni/multi-modal) are also plotted.
Figure 6. Visualization for percentage of experts in different MoEs. Here each MoE consists of 4 experts.
